Class handles pizza baking, contact management, notifications, discounts, and complaints.
Chained if-elif-else on complaint string with four branches, all calling clean_kitchen.

Method 'middle_method' only delegates to 'self.real_method()' with no added behavior.

Fields size, dough_type, topping, extra_cheese are strings/bools where objects would be clearer.
Five customer fields (first_name, last_name, address, phone_number, email) appear together repeatedly.
